'''鈭歳-n-v-zh''' ('''karanvezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumble|tumble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumble|tumble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-n-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| karanvezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranvezhoko|thiranvezhoko]] || [[word:jiranvezhoko|jiranvezhoko]] || [[word:shiranvezhoko|shiranvezhoko]] || [[word:kiranvezhoko|kiranvezhoko]]
